records.office_title: Comoros Assembly of the Union deputy monthly base indemnity
records.source_label: Comoros Organic Law 05-004/AU fixing Assembly deputy indemnities
records.notes: Official Ministry of Justice PDF. The source fixes the monthly base indemnity for deputies; specific additional benefits are set separately by the Assembly Bureau and are not quantified in this source.

raw_data.source_lines: Article premier: L'indemnite mensuelle de base des deputes de l'Assemblee de l'Union des Comores est fixe a 500 000 francs Comoriens.
